privileged_info_summary: The task requires sending a secure message in the NOSH EHR system. The recipient is the provider 'demo_provider' (Dr. James Carter). The message must be linked to patient Maria Rodriguez (DOB: 1978-06-14). The message subject must contain the keyword 'URGENT' and the body must contain '6.2' (the potassium lab value). All specified credentials and patient/provider names have been verified in the system setup scripts.
